description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, angular design. The headband and ear cups are primarily constructed from matte black plastic, with the inner surfaces of the ear pads and headband lined in a vibrant teal mesh fabric for comfort. The ear cups are large and rectangular with rounded edges, and each features a visible logo on the outer shell. A boom microphone extends from the left ear cup, indicating the headphones are designed for communication as well as audio playback. The overall build appears robust, with thick padding and a sturdy headband, suggesting suitability for extended use. The headphones are likely intended for gaming or professional audio environments, given their size and integrated microphone.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear headphones with teal mesh padding, matte black plastic frame, and an attached boom microphone.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both teal-padded ear cups and the headband's inner lining.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the left ear cup with logo and the extended boom microphone.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the symmetrical ear cups and headband padding.
description_view_3: Side view of the right ear cup with logo, no visible microphone.
